chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 843 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For direction 1. For orders on CMA No.8221/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.8222/2021 (E/A) 3. For orders on CMA No.8223/2021 (Contempt) 07-12-2021 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Brohi, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed for alleged contempt of order dated 26-01-2021. We have perused the said order. Such order is only on some contempt application; of which no further contempt can be entertained; therefore, this Application is misconceived and is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
